### First we setup cookiecutter environment for folder structure
```{python}
pipx install cookiecutter-data-science

# From the parent directory where you want this project
ccds
```

contd..

- To create a new project run this command at the command line. 
- The cookiecutter will create a directory for you. **No need to create manually.**

```{python}
cookiecutter https://github.com/drivendata/cookiecutter-data-science
```


```{python}

```
